diff --git a/OracleV5.Strategy/Diagnostics/OracleStrategy_Part99_SelfTest.cs b/OracleV5.Strategy/Diagnostics/OracleStrategy_Part99_SelfTest.cs
index 99d4acc..ffc745b 100644
--- a/OracleV5.Strategy/Diagnostics/OracleStrategy_Part99_SelfTest.cs
+++ b/OracleV5.Strategy/Diagnostics/OracleStrategy_Part99_SelfTest.cs
@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ namespace OracleV5
 
             TestPositionSizer();
             TestAccountGuardDrawdown();
+            TestSelectorCandidates();
 
             OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "==================================================");
             OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "   SIM-MODE SELF-TEST COMPLETED                   ");
@@ -113,6 +114,53 @@ namespace OracleV5
             OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", $"State 3 (Drop): {state3.State}, DD={dd3.DrawdownFromPeak:F2}, Reason={state3.ReasonCode}");
         }
 
+        private void TestSelectorCandidates()
+        {
+            OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", ">>> TESTING SELECTOR CANDIDATE RESET");
+
+            // Using reflection to safely access members across conditional compilation directives (NINJATRADER).
+            var resetMethod = GetType().GetMethod("ResetSelectorCandidates");
+            if (resetMethod == null)
+            {
+                OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "Skipping Selector test: ResetSelectorCandidates not found.");
+                return;
+            }
+
+            var registerMethod = GetType().GetMethod("RegisterSelectorCandidate");
+            var candidatesField = GetType().GetField("selectorCandidates", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
+            var selectedField = GetType().GetField("selectedCandidate", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
+
+            var candidateType = GetType().GetNestedType("SelectorCandidate");
+            if (candidateType == null || registerMethod == null || candidatesField == null || selectedField == null)
+            {
+                OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "Error: Selector reflection metadata incomplete.");
+                return;
+            }
+
+            // 1. Populate state
+            var candidate = Activator.CreateInstance(candidateType);
+            registerMethod.Invoke(this, new[] { candidate });
+
+            var listBefore = (System.Collections.IList)candidatesField.GetValue(this);
+            int countBefore = listBefore?.Count ?? 0;
+            OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", $"Candidates before reset: {countBefore}");
+
+            // 2. Perform reset
+            resetMethod.Invoke(this, null);
+
+            // 3. Verify state
+            var listAfter = (System.Collections.IList)candidatesField.GetValue(this);
+            var selectedAfter = selectedField.GetValue(this);
+            int countAfter = listAfter?.Count ?? 0;
+
+            OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", $"Candidates after reset: {countAfter}, Selected is null: {selectedAfter == null}");
+
+            if (countAfter == 0 && selectedAfter == null)
+                OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "SUCCESS: ResetSelectorCandidates cleared state correctly.");
+            else
+                OracleLog.Write("SELF_TEST", "FAILURE: ResetSelectorCandidates failed to clear state.");
+        }
+
         private static AccountGuardSnapshot BuildSelfTestGuardSnapshot(DrawdownMonitorResult drawdown)
         {
             return new AccountGuardSnapshot
